prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次依次约3211→3954→8654→7235→3788名，2023–2024年因宏福校区单独招生导致位次大幅后移，2025年回归主校区后位次回 升至3788名，近两年波动较大；该校在陕西物理类（理科）招生计划：2021年64人、2022年64人、2023年64人、2024年62人、2025年65人；2026年计划大 幅增至86人，较2025年扩招约32.3%，扩招幅度显著，对竞争有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年升至第50名（2025年第60名、20 24年第63名），排名持续上升，学校层次和综合实力稳步提升；2026年声誉文件中北邮未出现明显负面事件；抖音热度排名第64位，评价为"一般"，短视频曝光 量中等；历史投档异常记录中未见北邮断档信号，整体声誉平稳；信息与通信工程A+（全国顶尖）、计算机科学与技术A、电子科学与技术A-、网络空间安全A- 、软件工程A-，共6个A类学科，信息通信领域实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信类2024年评为"高热推荐"，计算机类评为"推荐"（67.80），相关专业社会热度持续高位；陕西省2026年物理类考生约206500人，较2025年172468人增加约19.7%，考生规模明显扩大，竞争加剧。 北邮位于北京，对陕西考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在陕西招生占比约1.8%（2025年），属中等偏低水平，扩招后占比将有所提升。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025 年基准位次3788名、2026年大幅扩招32.3%对竞争的缓解作用、软科排名持续上升带来的吸引力增强、以及陕西物理类考生增加19.7%带来的竞争加剧，考虑扩招幅度大于考生增幅且学校排名上升，预计位次较主值小幅前移；预测最低位次约4473名，区间3973–4973名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 3211 → 3954 → 8654 → 7235 → 3788. In 2023–2024, due to separate enrollment at Hongfu Campus, rankings significantly dropped, but in 2025, returning to the main campus, rankings rose back to 3788, showing large fluctuations in recent two years. The enrollment plan for this university in Shaanxi Physics Category (Science): 64 in 2021, 64 in 2022, 64 in 2023, 62 in 2024, 65 in 2025; in 2026, the plan significantly increases to 86, an expansion of about 32.3% compared to 2025, which is notable and helps alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it rose to 50th (60th in 2025, 63rd in 2024), with continuously rising rankings, steadily improving university level and comprehensive strength; in the 2026 reputation document, no significant negative events for BUPT appeared; Douyin popularity ranking 64th, rated as 'average', with medium short video exposure; no signs of enrollment gaps in historical abnormal records, overall reputation stable; Information and Communication Engineering A+ (top nationally), Computer Science and Technology A, Electronic Science and Technology A-, Cyberspace Security A-, Software Engineering A-, a total of 6 A-class disciplines, with outstanding strength in information and communication fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication category rated as 'highly recommended' in 2024, Computer category rated as 'recommended' (67.80), related majors maintain high social popularity; in 2026, Shaanxi Physics Category candidates approximately 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% from 172,468 in 2025, significantly expanding candidate scale, intensifying competition. BUPT is located in Beijing, with strong regional appeal to Shaanxi candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Shaanxi is about 1.8% (2025), at a medium-low level, which will increase after expansion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 3788, the alleviation effect of the significant 32.3% expansion in 2026 on competition, the increased appeal from continuously rising Soft Science rankings, and the intensified competition from a 19.7% increase in Shaanxi Physics Category candidates, considering the expansion rate exceeds the candidate growth rate and the university's ranking rise, the ranking is expected to slightly move forward compared to the main value; predicted minimum ranking approximately 4473, range 3973–4973.

For rankings within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Communication Engineering, Computer Category, Electronic Information Category, etc., as flagship majors), Tier 1 Yuan Class majors require a sprint (ranking significantly better than the lower bound of the range), and Tier 3 majors can be used as safety choices. BUPT has outstanding disciplinary advantages in information and communication fields, with broad employment prospects for related majors; it is recommended to prioritize majors corresponding to A-class disciplines.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including Liberal Arts) were approximately 1177 → 1901 → 1430 → 1542 → 1355, fluctuating within the 1200–1900 range, with a baseline ranking of about 1355 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for History Category (Liberal Arts) in Shaanxi: 12 in 2021, 12 in 2022, 11 in 2023, 12 in 2024, 12 in 2025; the 2026 plan remains 12, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 50th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a continuous rise in recent years and steadily improving comprehensive strength. In the 2026 reputation document, no significant negative incidents were reported for BUPT; Douyin popularity ranking 64th, rated as 'average'; no signs of admission breaks in historical submission anomaly records, overall reputation stable. BUPT is known for information and communication, with liberal arts majors (law, etc.) being less prominent.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the number of History Category examinees in Shaanxi is about 88,500, an increase of approximately 17.0% from 75,641 in 2025, indicating a significant expansion of the examinee pool and intensified competition. The social popularity of BUPT's liberal arts majors is average; located in Beijing, it has strong regional appeal to Shaanxi examinees. However, the university is known for science and engineering, with a small liberal arts enrollment (only 12), offering limited liberal arts major choices.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1355, unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, intensified competition due to a 17.0% increase in Shaanxi History Category examinees, and BUPT's liberal arts majors not being its strength, the competition is expected to slightly intensify. The predicted minimum ranking is about 1385, with a range of 1177–1593.
